## Checklist

- [ ] I did not commit `.env`, local private files, generated exports, or real personal data.
- [ ] I updated tests or documented why tests were not needed.
- [ ] I updated OpenAPI/Postman/README when API behavior changed.
- [ ] I checked permissions and organization scoping for private data.
- [ ] I added screenshots for UI changes when useful.
